title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Development Council 2021-07 Dated June 24, 2021 Entitled ?resolution Realigning Certain Portions of the 20% Municipal Development Fund for Cy 2021 Continuing Appropriations Amounting to Four Million Seven Hundred Thousand Pesos (P 4,700,000.00) for Various Purposes and Approving the Same.
